title: INE Spain — Consumer Price Index (CPI), national general index level and monthly/annual variation, series since January 1961
time_coverage: 1961-01 to 2026-06 (index level table has NaN/empty cells for months not applicable to a given base)
units: Index (base varies by vintage) and % variation, described in INE metadata
license_terms: INE public statistics, free reuse with attribution
notes: Downloaded via INE JaxiT3 CSV bulk-download endpoint (https://www.ine.es/jaxiT3/files/t/en/csv_bd/<table_id>.csv?nocab=1), English column headers. 24075 = monthly/annual % variation rate of national general CPI index since 1961; 24077 = national general CPI index level since 1961. Empty string cells ("") represent no-data points in INE's export.
